name: storystormer-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for StoryStormer — install it in Claude Cowork (desktop) or Claude Code with one /plugin install.

plugins.name: storystormer
plugins.description: Conversational story development workspace — brainstorm, canon, treatment, and chapter outline, for standalone novels or multi-book series. Drop into any folder, bring any state of materials, and Claude triages, structures, develops, and outlines the story alongside you.
